items.title: Enhance Fish TTS Credit Estimates in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update improves the Fish TTS credit estimation by deriving byte counts from trimmed UTF-8 text and including the default `s2-pro` model in cost evaluations. It ensures small positive estimates are displayed accurately without rounding to zero and adds regression tests for Chinese UTF-8 byte counts. Overall, these changes enhance the accuracy and clarity of billing for users.

items.title: Enhance Upstream Correlation IDs for Seedance in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the recording of upstream correlation IDs in the BananaRouter Seedance video path, enabling better tracing of finished jobs back to their upstream sources. Key changes include capturing `upstream_task_id`, `upstream_original_task_id`, and `upstream_request_id`, which are now included in the `ISeedanceVideo` result and logged for reconciliation. This enhancement improves debugging capabilities without affecting billing.

items.title: Enhance AuthPanel Listener Management in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses a critical issue with the AuthPanel by ensuring that stale iframe message listeners are properly removed when login panels close. Key changes include the addition of cleanup logic for both web and native listeners, which prevents memory leaks and potential crashes during user sessions. Comprehensive regression tests have also been implemented to validate these improvements.

items.title: Fix missing deploy script for yescaptcha in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the missing `yescaptcha/deploy/run.sh` script, ensuring that yescaptcha deployments are correctly applied to the Kubernetes cluster. Previously, deployments were built and pushed but never applied, resulting in stale pod images. The new script mirrors existing deployment patterns and includes a rollout status check to confirm successful application.

items.title: Introducing hCaptcha CLI for Easy Verification in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new hCaptcha CLI, enabling users to classify challenge images and retrieve tokens via the AceDataCloud API. Key commands include `recognize` for image classification and `token` for solving captchas with asynchronous support. The CLI follows a consistent structure with other tools in the monorepo, enhancing usability and integration.

items.title: Exciting New Async Poll API for Captcha Tasks in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the new `/captcha/tasks` API for asynchronous captcha task polling, enhancing the hCaptcha service. Key changes include the addition of an `async` parameter to the OpenAPI request body and comprehensive documentation on the new functionality. The migration also ensures that the API is registered with a cost rule of zero, streamlining the billing process.

items.title: Enhance Captcha Handling with Idempotency Guard in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces support for the yescaptcha async create and poll flow in the Gateway. Key changes include the addition of a new `/captcha/tasks` endpoint that bypasses auto-billing while ensuring token authentication. An idempotency guard has also been implemented to prevent double-charging during retries, enhancing the reliability of the billing process.

items.title: Enhance YesCaptcha with Async Task Handling in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an asynchronous create and poll mode for the YesCaptcha API, allowing users to submit tasks and retrieve tokens without blocking requests. Key improvements include a new MongoDB task store for ownership enforcement and single-shot billing, ensuring that only successful token solves incur charges. The changes enhance the efficiency of multi-solver setups and maintain robust billing practices.

items.title: Final Runtime Audit Completed in Index 🚀
items.summary: The pre-merge Browser Device Bridge audit has been replaced with authoritative merged commits and production rollout evidence. Key incidents and runtime proofs have been documented, while public rollout remains blocked pending further internal validations. All relevant PRs have been merged, ensuring a clean deployment closure.

items.title: Transforming Task Deletion to Soft Delete in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update changes the `/tasks` delete action from a hard delete to a soft delete by adding a `deleted_at` timestamp. This ensures that deleted tasks are retained in the database but are excluded from task-history reads, enhancing data integrity and user experience. The implementation affects multiple worker scripts across various services, ensuring consistent behavior without requiring client-side changes.
